title: The Vertex Guidance — The Question
description: In The Vertex, the party reflects on what lies ahead. The Calibrant is waiting with a question.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: This is the last world. I can feel it. There's nothing beyond this except the question.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: The Calibrant said the last world is a question. Not a challenge. Not a test.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: Then we go find the question. And we answer it.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: What if we don't like the answer?

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: Then we find a better one. That's what we've been doing since Harmonia.
